analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet states that Parliament calls for the Conference on the Future of Europe to start as soon as possible, linking to a press release. Evaluation: EU1 (EU is a successful story) – not supported; no mention of past successes or lessons learned. EU2 (EU is united) – not supported; no claim of unity or agreement among member states, just a call from Parliament. EU3 (EU is useful for its citizens) – weakly implied at best; however, the tweet does not specify citizen benefits or policies improving lives, only an institutional procedural step, so not enough to claim this narrative. EU4 (EU as avant‑garde actor) – not supported; no pioneering regulation or leadership on future challenges is asserted. EU5 (EU as global champion of fair causes) – not relevant. EU6 (EU contributes to a better world) – not relevant. Conclusion: No listed narratives are clearly promoted.
